# Code RED source/decompiled export
# Source: research/Code_RED_Car_Truck_FBI_Pass26_RESEARCH/RUN_PARSE_DECOMPILED_FBI_CAR_TRUCK.bat
# SHA1: 619283374c300a50ea9a6fc06d11092d42924d87

@echo off
setlocal
cd /d "%~dp0"
py -3 tools\parse_decompiled_fbi_car_truck.py
if errorlevel 1 python tools\parse_decompiled_fbi_car_truck.py
pause
